	is_foreign = no
	pop_type = burghers

	category = basic_industry_category
	
	employment_size = guild_employment

	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	

	build_time = guild_build_time
	
	unique_production_methods = {
		metalwork_guild_maintenance = {
			iron = 0.75
			produced = tools
			output = 1.05

			
			debug_max_profit = 0.4
			category = guild_input
		}

			stone = 0.70
			produced = tools
			output = 0.2625

			debug_max_profit = 0.1

			category = guild_input
		}

			copper = 0.5
			tin = 0.04
			produced = tools
			output = 0.63

			debug_max_profit = 0.2

			category = guild_input
		}
		copper_tools_guild_maintenance = {
			# unlocked by copperworking advance
			copper = 0.5
			produced = tools
			output = 0.5775

			debug_max_profit = 0.15

			category = guild_input
		}
	}

	construction_demand = guild_construction

}
